title: AdminGUI
description: A plugin that adds an admin gui, in the gui there is the name and head of every player in the server and when you click on someone, you can ban him, kick him, explode him, smite him, heal him, make him teleport to u and even toggle gamemodes!
body:
✨ AdminGUI – Powerful Player Management Interface
AdminGUI is a simple yet powerful moderation tool that gives server staff a fast, intuitive, and clean GUI for managing players.
No commands to remember — everything is handled through easy-to-use menus.

Features
Player List GUI
View all online players in a paginated menu

Player heads with:
UUID

Health
Smooth page switching

Refresh button

Close button
⚡ Action Menu
Select any player to open a dedicated action panel with tools like:

Kick

Ban (via console command)

Explode

Lightning strike

Heal to full

Teleport to you

Toggle between Creative/Survival
Permissions
admingui.use — grants access to the entire GUI
️ Safe & Reliable
All clicks properly cancelled only within GUI menus

Prevents interference with normal inventory interactions

Smart handling for offline or vanished players
Perfect For
Moderation staff needing quick tools

Servers that want a clean, modern admin panel

Anyone who prefers GUI moderation instead of commands
